brief_justification: Correct answer (Yes) with valid causal reasoning; Multi-level analysis covering causal graph structure, root node insight (do-calculus equivalence), and algebraic derivation; Suppress/Amplify framing shows some metacognitive awareness but no mid-stream course correction; Strong verification via algebraic generalization showing coefficient is negative for any increased p; Acknowledges interventional vs observational distinction but doesn't discuss uncertainty about the survival rates themselves; Notes the root-node property makes interventional equal to observational but doesn't explore what would happen if vaccination weren't a root node; Complete derivation trail from DAG to formula to conclusion, fully reproducible
